nodes.label: Range Finder View
nodes.rationale: Uses lagging indicators (ADX, BB, CVD, POC, RSI, funding) to score grid suitability 0-10; designed to pick direction, derive range from ATR, recommend grid count, estimate duration â€” lagging indicators chosen because they confirm established conditions suitable for grid bots.

nodes.label: Signal Scanner View
nodes.rationale: Uses 6 leading indicators to detect regime transitions before they happen; urgency ranking and ETA allow traders to enter before lagging score catches up.

nodes.label: Bot Monitor View
nodes.rationale: Read-only Pionex API access chosen to minimise risk; generates HOLD/CLOSE/TAKE_PROFIT/WARNING alerts by cross-referencing live bot P&L against cached market conditions.

nodes.label: config.py â€” Configuration
nodes.rationale: All thresholds centralised in CFG/GRID_CONFIG dicts so overrides never require touching calculation modules â€” single source for tuning.

nodes.label: indicators.py â€” Technical Indicators
nodes.rationale: All math ported from original JavaScript engine to ensure parity; indicators.py is the single source of truth for calculation logic.

nodes.label: pionex_client.py â€” Pionex API Client
nodes.rationale: HMAC SHA256 auth with Bot reading permission only â€” read-only scope chosen to minimise security exposure.

nodes.label: refresh_data.py â€” Data Refresh Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Cron entry point refreshes every 20 min; on Streamlit Cloud refresh_one() runs on page load eliminating need for external cron.

nodes.label: SQLite MetricsCache
nodes.rationale: SQLite chosen over heavier DB for simplicity and zero-config deployment on Streamlit Community Cloud; cache resets on redeployment which is acceptable for a metrics cache.

nodes.label: ADX â€” Average Directional Index
nodes.rationale: High ADX blocks grid: trending markets cause grid bots to over-trade against the trend. Threshold raised from 22 to 25 because alts often trend at 22-25 without killing grid profitability.

nodes.label: RSI â€” Relative Strength Index
nodes.rationale: Block threshold raised 68->72 and score zones widened because crypto sustains higher RSI without being extreme. Catches accumulation/distribution zones before reversal.

nodes.label: ATR â€” Average True Range
nodes.rationale: ATR multiplied by 3.0 (raised from 2.5) to produce wider default ranges and reduce whipsaws.

nodes.label: Bollinger Bands
nodes.rationale: BB_MIN lowered from 2.0% to 1.5% because alts compress tighter; 2% was blocking valid setups.

nodes.label: Donchian Channel
nodes.rationale: DC/ATR ratio threshold tightened from 1.0 to 0.7 so squeeze bonus only fires on genuine price compression.

nodes.label: MACD â€” Moving Average Convergence Divergence
nodes.norm_label: macd a€” moving average convergence divergence

nodes.label: POC / AVWAP â€” Point of Control / Anchored VWAP
nodes.norm_label: poc / avwap a€” point of control / anchored vwap

nodes.label: Squeeze Detection
nodes.rationale: BB bandwidth < 5% AND Donchian/ATR ratio < 0.7 defines a squeeze â€” compressed price is prime grid window before breakout.

nodes.label: Original JavaScript Engine (source of truth)
nodes.rationale: JS engine is the authoritative math reference; Python port in indicators.py must match its results exactly to ensure correctness.

nodes.label: Signal Scanner View
nodes.description: Predictive signal scanner dashboard showing crypto pair urgency rankings and leading indicator analysis

nodes.label: Urgency Ranking Table
nodes.description: Tabular list of trading pairs ranked by setup urgency with columns: Symbol, Timeframe, Setup Label, Signal type, Direction, Grid Score, Grid Label, FTA

nodes.label: Signal Detail Panel
nodes.description: Expanded detail card for TRX/USDT showing Setup Score 4.8, stage label EARLY/DEVELOPING, direction Neutral, and component indicator bars

nodes.label: Setup Score (0-10)
nodes.description: Large numeric score (4.8 shown for TRX/USDT) representing predictive leading indicator aggregate, scale 0-10

nodes.label: Grid Score Column
nodes.description: Numeric grid suitability score (0-10) shown per pair in the urgency table, lagging indicator based

nodes.label: Setup Label (Grid Label)
nodes.description: Qualitative label for setup quality: DEVELOPING, AVOID, STRONG SETUP, GOOD SETUP. Shown in both Setup and Grid Label columns

nodes.label: Signal Type Column
nodes.description: Signal category column: GRID WINDOW (dominant), NO SIGNAL, NONE â€” indicates detected signal type per pair

nodes.label: Direction Column
nodes.description: Per-pair directional bias: Neutral shown for most pairs in the visible rows

nodes.label: FTA Column (First Target Area)
nodes.description: First Target Area column â€” shows time estimate or Unknown for ETA of signal resolution

nodes.label: Stage Label (EARLY / DEVELOPING)
nodes.description: Signal maturity stage shown next to setup score: EARLY indicates signal just forming, DEVELOPING means progressing but not confirmed

nodes.label: Component Indicator Bars
nodes.description: Horizontal progress bars for individual leading indicators: STR Divergence, Squeeze Progress, Structure Transition, Funding/OI Imbalance, Momentum Div, Volume Exhaustion â€” each showing partial scores

nodes.label: STR Divergence Indicator
nodes.description: Leading indicator: structure/price divergence from expected trend, shown as bar with numeric value

nodes.label: Squeeze Progress Indicator
nodes.description: Leading indicator: BB/Donchian squeeze progression â€” how far into compression phase the pair is

nodes.label: Structure Transition Indicator
nodes.description: Leading indicator: market structure shift detection â€” transitioning between bearish/bullish regimes

nodes.label: Funding/OI Imbalance Indicator
nodes.description: Leading indicator: open interest and funding rate imbalance â€” detects derivatives-driven price pressure

nodes.label: Momentum Divergence Indicator
nodes.description: Leading indicator: RSI/MACD momentum diverging from price action â€” early reversal warning

nodes.label: Volume Exhaustion Indicator
nodes.description: Leading indicator: declining volume on trend moves indicating exhaustion before reversal or consolidation

nodes.label: TRX/USDT Pair (Detail)
nodes.description: Selected pair shown in expanded detail: TRX/USDT with Setup Score 4.8, EARLY DEVELOPING, Neutral direction, Grid 9.9 DEVELOPING

nodes.label: Action Label Column
nodes.description: Per-pair recommended action text: Monitor closely, No action needed â€” shown as first implied column in table

nodes.label: Timeframe Column
nodes.description: Candle timeframe used for signal calculation â€” visible as column between Symbol and Setup columns
